title: DeathLogger
description: Track player deaths with detailed logging information.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

DeathLogger is a Minecraft plugin designed to keep track of player deaths by recording detailed information about each death event. This plugin logs the player's name, location of death, time of death, and the cause of death into a text file, providing server administrators with valuable insights into player activities and potential hazards within the game. [More detailed description here.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/17)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
 
Are you a developer?
Join AshSource to share your work with a growing community! Get started now at [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
